publicationStmt.p: Unpublished draft from Babken Chookaszian volume I extraction

div.head: Article 512
div.p:
ԱՆՎԱՆԱՑԱՆԿ
513
Grigor 4, 7, 141, 153, 156, 159, 160, 161, 163,
164, 301, 303, 349, 351, 352
Grigorian 4 Grigoris 301, 303 Gruziy 164 Hagop 490 Haïg 292 Hakobyan 294 Halle 295, 348 Halle-Wittenberg 348 Hammer 64, 295 Hammer-Purgstall 295 Harut‘unyan 293 Harutjunjan 293 Hatchikian 305 Havila 165 Hayastan 292, 299 Haykuni 161 Hayton 294 Hedayāt 162 Herac‘i 297 Heracʻi 302, 303 Herakl 299 Herod 118 Het‘um 294, 297, 300, 304 Hiéroclès 295 Hills
div.note: Full text truncated for TEI draft. See article_512.txt for complete extraction.
